lesson.subtitle: Aula 10 -- Review -- Professional Communication
lesson.title_tag: Professor View -- Anna Flávia Miranda da Silva | Aula 10 -- Review: Professional Communication

listenings.text: Hello, I am Anna. I work at Usina Cururique. Every morning, I read my email and I reply to my partners. Then I call our buyers on the phone. Sometimes they are busy, so I take a message. In the afternoon, I check my calendar and I make plans for next week. I also show our product to visitors. Our sugar is white, clean and natural. I love my job.

Hello, this is Mr. Costa. I am calling about your sugar. I want to make a plan for next week. Are you free on Tuesday? Please send me an email with the price. I need a sweet and natural product in strong bags. Thank you, and please call me back.

extra_audio.text: First, Anna reads the email from the buyer. Then she calls the buyer on the phone. Next, she checks her calendar and makes a plan. After that, she describes the product: white, clean and sweet. Finally, she sends a reply and confirms the meeting.
